title: Li Auto SWOT Analysis: Autonomous Driving Tech Advantages
text: Li Auto's SWOT analysis reveals autonomous driving technology as a key strength fueling stock potential. The company's strategy focuses on expanding average selling price and margins by increasing the AD Max take rate, emphasizing value-added features and technological advancement. The VLA Driver large model, with 4 billion parameters, is being rolled out across the lineup and is described as a major leap in assisted driving, with the company expecting it to be an industry leader. Li Auto is confident in achieving Level 4 autonomous driving by 2027. The company is investing more than RMB 6 billion in AI in 2025, with a proprietary AI chip in vehicle testing expected to be deployed on flagship models in 2026. Intelligence is becoming a critical driver of users' purchasing decisions, which positions Li Auto's autonomous driving investments as a key competitive differentiator. Strengths include technological leadership in autonomous driving and AI integration. Weaknesses include recent profitability challenges and delivery declines. Opportunities exist in overseas expansion and premium segment growth. Threats include intense competition from Huawei-backed AITO and BYD's premium brand push.
